name: Bandit Group
description: Desperate people with weapons. Some are cruel, most are hungry. All are dangerous in numbers.

sensory.sight: figures stepping onto the road from both sides, too coordinated to be travelers
sensory.sound: a whistle signal, then boots on gravel, then a voice saying 'your purse or your life'
sensory.feel: the sudden awareness that you're surrounded

encounter_hooks: a fallen tree blocking the road — too clean a cut to be natural
a traveler stumbling toward you, robbed and beaten, pointing back down the road
a camp visible off the trail, with lookouts who've spotted you first
notes: Bandits are people. Some can be talked down. Some can be bribed. Some have reasons. The leader matters — kill or capture the leader and the rest scatter or surrender.
